recipes.title: Scaffold a feature package
recipes.description: End-to-end recipe for a new feature — workspace package, data/domain/presentation layers, Cubit + State, Page, GetIt registration, and a route.

recipes.title: Extract a widget / split a Cubit
recipes.description: Pull a sub-tree out of a Page into its own View widget, or split an overgrown Cubit, keeping bloc_tests green and DI registration in sync.
